scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix mtse-backend/beplayground && npm install --prefix mtse-frontend-store && npm install --prefix mtse-frontend-admin
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run start:backend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run start:store" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run start:admin"
